name: deep-research
description: Multi-agent deep research plugin. Auto-scales from single-agent to a 3-tier hierarchy with Opus 4.7 managers and Opus 4.7 data collectors based on topic complexity. Conducts reconnaissance via goodmem, decomposes topics into non-overlapping domains, dispatches research agents sequentially, synthesizes findings with confidence grading, and documents results in the Obsidian vault with goodmem ingestion. Supports slash command (/deep-research) and natural language triggers.
